response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with roughly 20 years of broad software development experience, genuine entrepreneurial initiative via GISCollective, and consistent community contributions through talks and workshops. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, demonstrated AI expertise and a track record of strategic advisory work. His AI involvement is limited to approximately two months at re:cinq working on MCP tooling and agentic workflow frameworks, with no history of building AI products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product vision. His career arc is firmly that of a senior-to-staff individual contributor focused on execution, which falls meaningfully short of the seniority and influence profile this position requires.
strengths: Broad multi-language, multi-platform engineering depth spanning ~20 years across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform actively used by real organizations
Consistent external knowledge-sharing through conference talks, public workshops, and open-source library contributions
concerns: AI expertise is extremely shallow and very recent — only ~2 months of AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling) with no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products
No advanced degree in AI or a related field; holds only a BS in Computer Science and a BA in fine arts, both well below the preferred Master's/PhD threshold

Career trajectory reflects a senior/staff individual contributor executing on defined problems, not a director-level strategist advising customers, influencing roadmaps, or leading technical vision at scale
